Description: AI-Agent Security PoC on a private, SSM-managed EC2 instance in the selected region

SubnetId.Description: Private subnet with NAT or VPC endpoints for SSM, ECR, Secrets Manager, and HTTPS provider egress

AmiId.Description: Current approved Amazon Linux 2023 AMI with SSM Agent

ContainerImage.Description: Immutable ECR image URI including sha256 digest

ContainerRepositoryArn.Description: ARN of the one ECR repository containing ContainerImage

RuntimeSecretName.Description: Name of the dedicated AgentSec secret whose SecretString is a Docker env-file

Properties.GroupDescription: No ingress; HTTPS egress only for SSM, ECR, Secrets Manager, and approved model APIs

SecurityGroupEgress.Description: HTTPS egress; use VPC endpoints and egress proxy for production

Fn::Base64.Fn::Sub:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
dnf install -y docker
command -v aws >/dev/null
systemctl enable --now docker
install -d -m 0700 /etc/agentsec
aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --region ${AWS::Region} --secret-id '${RuntimeSecretName}' --query SecretString --output text > /etc/agentsec/runtime.env
chmod 0600 /etc/agentsec/runtime.env
registry=$(printf '%s' '${ContainerImage}' | cut -d/ -f1)
aws ecr get-login-password --region ${AWS::Region} | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin "$registry"
docker pull '${ContainerImage}'
cat > /etc/systemd/system/agentsec.service <<'UNIT'
[Unit]
Description=AI-Agent Security authorization service
After=docker.service network-online.target
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/docker rm -f agentsec
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker run --name agentsec --read-only --tmpfs /tmp:rw,noexec,nosuid,size=64m --cap-drop=ALL --security-opt=no-new-privileges --env-file=/etc/agentsec/runtime.env -p 127.0.0.1:8080:8080 '${ContainerImage}' serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker stop agentsec

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable --now agentsec.service

InstanceId.Description: Use Systems Manager Session Manager; no inbound port is open

LocalServiceUrl.Description: Reach only through SSM port forwarding during PoC
